rationale: In the citing paper, this 2007 article appears only in a grouped citation used to justify variable selection based on prior CLV/CRM studies. The text does not assign it a distinct conceptual or methodological role, and the paper's core benchmark/objective-function setup is attributed to other works (e.g., Kumar et al. 2008). There is no specific extension, refinement, application, or challenge directed at this cited paper.
